q: A pie chart represents a whole as a circle divided into sectors. What is the total angle of the circle at the center?
In a pie chart showing the expenditure of a family, if the sector representing 'Rent' has an angle of 120 degrees, what percentage of the total expenditure is on rent?
A pie chart shows the distribution of students in different streams in a school. If the 'Science' stream represents 40% of the students, what will be the angle of the sector representing Science?
Which of the following best describes the primary use of a pie chart?

opt.v: To compare individual parts to a whole.
To display relationships between two variables.

q: If a pie chart shows that 25% of the total is represented by a certain category, what fraction of the whole does this category represent?
In a pie chart representing the sales of different fruits, if the total sales are ₹50,000 and the sector for 'Apples' is 30%, what are the sales of apples?
A pie chart shows the percentage of marks obtained by a student in different subjects. If the student scored 80% in Mathematics, what would be the central angle for Mathematics?
Which of the following is NOT a typical component of a pie chart when presented?

opt.v: Legends (if colors are used for categories)

q: If a pie chart shows that the category 'Others' represents 10% of the total, what is the sum of the percentages of all other categories?
A pie chart illustrates the budget allocation for a project. If the sector for 'Salaries' is 90 degrees, what proportion of the total budget is allocated to salaries?
